title: Use of Funds Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger use of funds foundations judgment so capital / fundraising work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Use of Funds Foundations is a leverage point inside capital / fundraising. It supports the broader goal of fundraising, capital allocation, investor relations, and financial strategy.
coreConcepts: Use of Funds Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good use of funds foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Use of Funds Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
